Verse 14

Herod

Son of the Herod of our Lord's nativity; also vs. Mark 1:16-18; Mark 1:20-22 See margin ref., Matthew 14:1 (See Scofield "Matthew 14:1")

Verse 20

and observed

kept him safely, and, hearing him, did many things, hearing him gladly.
